name: Jecka (Alternate OD Route)
description:
“So laugh all you want. Forget about me all you want. But at least I’ll be gorgeous forever.”

Good LORD what was Flip Side cooking.

Alternate to the Foot Whore OD route, where after seeing Nicole “fucking” her dad, instead of taking pills till she overdoses, she runs away crying to you, her other friend.

Would this actually happen? Probably not. Is this an attempt to make something happy in this game where there’s like no happy endings? Yeah…

She’s 18.

Please comment on anything to fix about this bot. I might fix it. Maybe. If I feel like it.
creator: WhyAmIAThing
